commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can sanitize the new cron progress formatter and add focused regression coverage without changing the PR's product direction.; Needs attention: The diff adds a CLI-visible persisted progress string without terminal-control sanitization for every interpolated component.; Review finding: [P2] Sanitize cron progress before persisting it — src/cron/isolated-agent/run-executor.ts:132-141 (sha=8f49f5d059709a00a4e659d23f589310e8977f36)
commands.review_summary:
This PR surfaces model fallback and queue-drain progress in cron task run status, threads cron task run ids through isolated/manual execution, adds a runtime proof script, and updates fallback/governance docs.

PR surface: Source +114, Tests +280, Docs +165, Other +143. Total +702 across 17 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the remaining review finding: source inspection shows provider/model and fallback step strings are interpolated into a persisted progressSummary, while current persistence only normalizes whitespace and the CLI prints that summary directly. I did not execute a failing repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can sanitize the new cron progress formatter and add focused regression coverage without changing the PR's product direction.
